38756 0 R.description: Defines the clickable rectangle, border behavior, and the action or destination triggered by the selected hyperlink.

38768 0 R.description: Defines an internal jump action. Its /D entry points to the destination page or named destination.

items.source_comment: This component candidate comes from the original PDF annotation metadata. When available, the JavaScript `highlight(...)` rectangle is used; otherwise the annotation `/Rect` is used.

This component candidate comes from the original PDF annotation metadata. When available, the JavaScript `highlight(...)` rectangle is used; otherwise the annotation `/Rect` is used.
